Action.Str: setGlobal("DEBUG_MSG", "OFFER_ARRIVAL: OFFER_PROCESSING=" + global("OFFER_PROCESSING") + " LAST_OFFER=" + global("LAST_OFFER_TIME") + " DEMAND_READING=" + global("DEMAND_READING") + " FILTER_ON=" + global("FILTER_ON")); writeFile("/sdcard/Tasker/v3_debug.log", new Date().toISOString() + " | " + global("DEBUG_MSG") + " ", true); var last = parseInt(global("LAST_OFFER_TIME") || "0"); var now = parseInt(global("TIMES") || "0"); var skip = "0"; if (last > 0 && (now - last) < 5) skip = "1"; if (global("OFFER_PROCESSING") === "1") skip = "1"; if (global("DEMAND_READING") === "1") skip = "1"; setGlobal("DEBOUNCE_SKIP", skip);
Warning. Could not read fare. Decide manually.

var count = 200; var texts = []; for (var i = 1; i <= count; i++) { var t = global("ai_text(" + i + ")"); if (!t || t === "undefined") break; texts.push(t.trim()); } if (texts.length === 0) { var raw = global("ai_texts"); if (raw && raw !== "undefined" && raw.length > 0) { texts = raw.split(","); for (var z = 0; z < texts.length; z++) texts[z] = (texts[z] || "").trim(); } } var ride_type = "", badge = "", fare_raw = "", ratingStr = "", verified = ""; var pickup_eta = "", pickup_addr = "", trip_text = "", dropoff_addr = ""; var advantage_text = "", incentive = 0; var rideTypes = ["UberX","Comfort","UberXL","UberBlack","Green","Share","Pool","Connect","Premier"]; var addresses = []; for (var i = 0; i < texts.length; i++) { var t = texts[i]; if (!t || t.length === 0) continue; for (var r = 0; r < rideTypes.length; r++) { if (t === rideTypes[r]) { ride_type = t; break; } } if (t === "Exclusive") badge = t; if (t === "Verified") verified = t; if (!fare_raw && /^\$[\d,]+\.?\d*$/.test(t)) fare_raw = t; if (!ratingStr && /^\d\.\d{2}$/.test(t) && parseFloat(t) >= 1.0 && parseFloat(t) <= 5.0) ratingStr = t; if (!pickup_eta && /^\d+\s*mins?\s*\([\d.]+\s*mi\)$/.test(t)) pickup_eta = t; if (!trip_text && /^\d+\s*mins?\s*\([\d.]+\s*mi\)$/.test(t) && t !== pickup_eta) trip_text = t; if (t.indexOf("Advantage") > -1) advantage_text = t; if (t.indexOf("Incentive") > -1) { var im = t.match(/\$([\d.]+)/); if (im) incentive = parseFloat(im[1]); } if (t.length > 12 && /[&,]/.test(t) && !/^\$/.test(t) && !/^\d\.\d/.test(t)) addresses.push(t); } if (addresses.length >= 2) { pickup_addr = addresses[0]; dropoff_addr = addresses[1]; } else if (addresses.length === 1) { dropoff_addr = addresses[0]; } var fare = 0; if (fare_raw) { var fm = fare_raw.match(/\$?([\d,.]+)/); if (fm) fare = parseFloat(fm[1].replace(",","")); } var rating_val = parseFloat(ratingStr) || 0; var pickup_min = 0, pickup_mi = 0; if (pickup_eta) { var pm = pickup_eta.match(/(\d+)\s*min.*?\(([\d.]+)\s*mi\)/); if (pm) { pickup_min = parseInt(pm[1]); pickup_mi = parseFloat(pm[2]); } } var trip_min = 0, trip_mi = 0; if (trip_text) { var tm = trip_text.match(/(\d+)\s*min.*?\(([\d.]+)\s*mi\)/); if (tm) { trip_min = parseInt(tm[1]); trip_mi = parseFloat(tm[2]); } } var per_mile = trip_mi > 0 ? (fare / trip_mi) : 0; var total_min = pickup_min + trip_min; var per_hour = total_min > 0 ? (fare / total_min * 60) : 0; var total_miles = pickup_mi + trip_mi; var effective_rate = total_miles > 0 ? (fare / total_miles) : 0; setGlobal("OFFER_TYPE", ride_type); setGlobal("OFFER_BADGE", badge); setGlobal("OFFER_FARE", fare.toFixed(2)); setGlobal("OFFER_RATING", rating_val.toFixed(2)); setGlobal("OFFER_VERIFIED", verified); setGlobal("OFFER_ADVANTAGE_TEXT", advantage_text); setGlobal("OFFER_INCENTIVE", incentive.toFixed(2)); setGlobal("OFFER_PICKUP_MIN", pickup_min.toString()); setGlobal("OFFER_PICKUP_MI", pickup_mi.toFixed(1)); setGlobal("OFFER_PICKUP_ADDRESS", pickup_addr); setGlobal("OFFER_TRIP_MIN", trip_min.toString()); setGlobal("OFFER_TRIP_MI", trip_mi.toFixed(1)); setGlobal("OFFER_DROPOFF_ADDRESS", dropoff_addr); setGlobal("OFFER_PER_MILE", per_mile.toFixed(2)); setGlobal("OFFER_PER_HOUR", per_hour.toFixed(2)); setGlobal("OFFER_TOTAL_MILES", total_miles.toFixed(1)); setGlobal("OFFER_EFFECTIVE_RATE", effective_rate.toFixed(2)); setGlobal("DEBUG_MSG", "READ_OFFER: fare=" + fare + " type=" + ride_type + " rating=" + rating_val + " pickup=" + pickup_addr + " dropoff=" + dropoff_addr + " texts_count=" + texts.length); writeFile("/sdcard/Tasker/v3_debug.log", new Date().toISOString() + " | " + global("DEBUG_MSG") + " ", true);

var type = global("OFFER_TYPE") || ""; var badge = global("OFFER_BADGE") || ""; var fare = parseFloat(global("OFFER_FARE")) || 0; var rating = parseFloat(global("OFFER_RATING")) || 0; var verified = global("OFFER_VERIFIED") || ""; var incentive = parseFloat(global("OFFER_INCENTIVE")) || 0; var pickup_min = parseInt(global("OFFER_PICKUP_MIN")) || 0; var pickup_mi = parseFloat(global("OFFER_PICKUP_MI")) || 0; var trip_min = parseInt(global("OFFER_TRIP_MIN")) || 0; var trip_mi = parseFloat(global("OFFER_TRIP_MI")) || 0; var dropoff = global("OFFER_DROPOFF_ADDRESS") || ""; var per_mile = parseFloat(global("OFFER_PER_MILE")) || 0; var per_hour = parseFloat(global("OFFER_PER_HOUR")) || 0; var decision = "DECLINE"; var reason = ""; var city = ""; setGlobal("OFFER_CHAIN_VALUE", "0"); setGlobal("OFFER_CHAIN_ADVANTAGE", "0"); var isShared = /Share|Pool/i.test(type); var minRating = parseFloat(global("MIN_RATING") || "4.5"); var maxPickup = parseInt(global("MAX_PICKUP_MIN") || "10"); var excludeList = (global("HARD_EXCLUDES") || "Los Angeles,Watts,Compton,Inglewood,South Gate,Lynwood").split(","); var parts = dropoff.split(","); var lastPart = parts.length > 0 ? parts[parts.length - 1].trim() : ""; lastPart = lastPart.replace(/\s*(CA|California)\s*\d*/i, "").trim(); if (lastPart.length < 3 && parts.length > 1) { lastPart = parts[parts.length - 2].trim(); } city = lastPart; if (isShared) { decision = "DECLINE"; reason = "Shared ride"; } else if (rating > 0 && rating < minRating) { decision = "DECLINE"; reason = "Low rating " + rating; } else { var excluded = false; for (var i = 0; i < excludeList.length; i++) { var ex = excludeList[i].trim().toLowerCase(); if (ex.length > 0 && city.toLowerCase().indexOf(ex) > -1) { decision = "DECLINE"; reason = excludeList[i].trim(); excluded = true; break; } } if (!excluded && pickup_min > maxPickup) { decision = "DECLINE"; reason = pickup_min + " minute pickup"; excluded = true; } if (!excluded) { var chainValues = {}; try { chainValues = JSON.parse(global("CHAIN_VALUES_JSON") || "{}"); } catch(e) {} var now = new Date(); var currentHour = now.getHours(); var arrivalMin = pickup_min + trip_min; var arrivalHour = (currentHour + Math.floor(arrivalMin / 60)) % 24; var currentCity = global("CURRENT_CITY") || "Unknown"; var defaultChain = parseFloat(global("DEFAULT_CHAIN_VALUE") || "20"); var landingKey = city + ":" + arrivalHour; var stayKey = currentCity + ":" + currentHour; var chainRate = chainValues[landingKey] || defaultChain; var stayRate = chainValues[stayKey] || defaultChain; if (global("PASSENGER_IN") === "1") { performTask("Queue Ride Evaluator", 10); var currentFare = parseFloat(global("CURRENT_FARE") || "0"); var currentPPM = parseFloat(global("CURRENT_PPM") || "0"); if (fare - currentFare > 5 || per_mile - currentPPM > 0.25) { decision = "ACCEPT"; reason = "Better ride redirect"; } else { decision = "DECLINE"; reason = "Worse than current"; } } else { var totalMin = pickup_min + trip_min; var rideValue = totalMin > 0 ? (fare + (chainRate * (trip_min / 60))) / totalMin * 60 : 0; var stayValue = stayRate; var adv = rideValue - stayValue; var acceptThresh = parseFloat(global("CHAIN_ADVANTAGE_ACCEPT") || "5"); var declineThresh = parseFloat(global("CHAIN_ADVANTAGE_DECLINE") || "-3"); var idleSince = parseInt(global("IDLE_SINCE") || "0"); var nowSec = parseInt(global("TIMES") || "0"); var idleMin = idleSince > 0 ? (nowSec - idleSince) / 60 : 0; if (adv > acceptThresh) { decision = "ACCEPT"; reason = "Good ride to " + city; } else if (adv >= 0) { var demandZones = []; try { demandZones = JSON.parse(global("DEMAND_ZONES_JSON") || "[]"); } catch(ee) {} var cityInDemand = false; for (var dz = 0; dz < demandZones.length; dz++) { if (demandZones[dz].name && city && demandZones[dz].name.indexOf(city) > -1) cityInDemand = true; } var repoTarget = global("REPOSITION_TARGET") || ""; if (repoTarget === "undefined") repoTarget = ""; var headingToTarget = (repoTarget && city === repoTarget); var eventBoost = false; try { var evts = JSON.parse(global("UPCOMING_EVENTS") || "[]"); for (var ev = 0; ev < evts.length; ev++) { if (evts[ev].amount && evts[ev].amount.indexOf("$") > -1) eventBoost = true; } } catch(eee) {} if (badge === "Exclusive" || incentive > 0 || cityInDemand || headingToTarget || eventBoost) { decision = "ACCEPT"; reason = "Exclusive or incentive"; } else if (idleMin > 8) { decision = "ACCEPT"; reason = "Idle " + Math.round(idleMin) + " min"; } else if (per_hour > 30) { decision = "ACCEPT"; reason = "Good hourly rate"; } else { decision = "ACCEPT"; reason = "Marginal accept to " + city; } } else if (adv >= declineThresh) { var demandZones = []; try { demandZones = JSON.parse(global("DEMAND_ZONES_JSON") || "[]"); } catch(ee) {} var cityInDemand = false; for (var dz = 0; dz < demandZones.length; dz++) { if (demandZones[dz].name && city && demandZones[dz].name.indexOf(city) > -1) cityInDemand = true; } var repoTarget = global("REPOSITION_TARGET") || ""; if (repoTarget === "undefined") repoTarget = ""; var headingToTarget = (repoTarget && city === repoTarget); var eventBoost = false; try { var evts = JSON.parse(global("UPCOMING_EVENTS") || "[]"); for (var ev = 0; ev < evts.length; ev++) { if (evts[ev].amount && evts[ev].amount.indexOf("$") > -1) eventBoost = true; } } catch(eee) {} if (badge === "Exclusive" || incentive > 0 || cityInDemand || headingToTarget || eventBoost) { decision = "ACCEPT"; reason = "Tiebreaker exclusive"; } else if (idleMin > 8) { decision = "ACCEPT"; reason = "Tiebreaker idle " + Math.round(idleMin) + " min"; } else { decision = "DECLINE"; reason = "Slightly worse, waiting"; } } else { decision = "DECLINE"; reason = city + " is weak at this hour"; } setGlobal("OFFER_CHAIN_VALUE", chainRate.toFixed(1)); setGlobal("OFFER_CHAIN_ADVANTAGE", adv.toFixed(1)); } } } setGlobal("OFFER_CITY", city); setGlobal("OFFER_DECISION", decision); setGlobal("OFFER_REASON", reason); setGlobal("DEBUG_MSG", "EVALUATE: decision=" + decision + " reason=" + reason + " city=" + city + " adv=" + (typeof adv !== "undefined" ? adv : "n/a")); writeFile("/sdcard/Tasker/v3_debug.log", new Date().toISOString() + " | " + global("DEBUG_MSG") + " ", true);

setGlobal("CURRENT_FARE", global("OFFER_FARE") || "0"); setGlobal("CURRENT_PPM", global("OFFER_PER_MILE") || "0"); setGlobal("CURRENT_MILES", global("OFFER_TRIP_MI") || "0"); setGlobal("DEADHEAD_MI", "0"); setGlobal("LAST_RIDE_TIME", global("TIMES") || "0"); setGlobal("CONSECUTIVE_DECLINES", "0");

var cd = parseInt(global("CONSECUTIVE_DECLINES") || "0") + 1; setGlobal("CONSECUTIVE_DECLINES", cd.toString()); setGlobal("IDLE_SINCE", global("TIMES") || "0"); setGlobal("LAST_IDLE_ADVICE_MIN", "0");
Watchdog cleared. Offer processing was stuck.

var fare = global("OFFER_FARE") || "0"; var city = global("OFFER_CITY") || "unknown"; var decision = global("OFFER_DECISION") || "DECLINE"; var msg = "Queue ride. " + Math.round(parseFloat(fare)) + " dollars to " + city + ". "; if (decision === "ACCEPT") { msg += "Accepting."; } else { msg += "Declining. " + (global("OFFER_REASON") || ""); } setGlobal("TTS_TEXT", msg); setGlobal("TTS_PRIORITY", "2");

setGlobal("DEBUG_MSG", "TTS_DISPATCH: text=" + (global("TTS_TEXT") || "empty").substring(0, 50) + " mode=" + (global("TTS_MODE") || "?")); writeFile("/sdcard/Tasker/v3_debug.log", new Date().toISOString() + " | " + global("DEBUG_MSG") + " ", true); var mode = global("TTS_MODE"); if (!mode || mode === "undefined") mode = "normal"; var priority = parseInt(global("TTS_PRIORITY") || "5"); var text = global("TTS_TEXT"); if (!text || text === "undefined") text = ""; setGlobal("TTS_TEXT", ""); setGlobal("TTS_PRIORITY", ""); if (text.length === 0) { } else if (mode === "silent") { } else if (mode === "minimal" && priority > 1) { } else { var ok = true; if (priority > 2) { var lt = parseInt(global("LAST_TTS_TIME") || "0"); var ns = parseInt(global("TIMES") || "0"); if (ns - lt < 15) ok = false; } if (ok) { setGlobal("LAST_TTS_TIME", global("TIMES") || "0"); if (mode === "verbose") { var cv = global("OFFER_CHAIN_VALUE") || ""; var adv = global("OFFER_CHAIN_ADVANTAGE") || ""; if (cv && cv !== "0" && cv !== "undefined") text += ". Chain value " + cv + " per hour"; if (adv && adv !== "0" && adv !== "undefined") text += ", advantage " + adv; } performTask("TTS Say", 9, text); } }

var ts = new Date().toISOString(); var decision = global("OFFER_DECISION") || ""; var fare = global("OFFER_FARE") || "0"; var ppm = global("OFFER_PER_MILE") || "0"; var pph = global("OFFER_PER_HOUR") || "0"; var tripMi = global("OFFER_TRIP_MI") || "0"; var pickupMi = global("OFFER_PICKUP_MI") || "0"; var pickupMin = global("OFFER_PICKUP_MIN") || "0"; var rating = global("OFFER_RATING") || ""; var verified = global("OFFER_VERIFIED") || ""; var exclusive = global("OFFER_BADGE") || ""; var incentive = global("OFFER_INCENTIVE") || "0"; var rideType = global("OFFER_TYPE") || ""; var city = global("OFFER_CITY") || ""; var pickupAddr = (global("OFFER_PICKUP_ADDRESS") || "").replace(/,/g, ";"); var dropoffAddr = (global("OFFER_DROPOFF_ADDRESS") || "").replace(/,/g, ";"); var dailyEarn = global("DAILY_EARN") || "0"; var weeklyEarn = global("WEEKLY_EARN") || "0"; var chainVal = global("OFFER_CHAIN_VALUE") || "0"; var advantage = global("OFFER_CHAIN_ADVANTAGE") || "0"; var idleSince = parseInt(global("IDLE_SINCE") || "0"); var nowSec = parseInt(global("TIMES") || "0"); var idleMin = idleSince > 0 ? ((nowSec - idleSince) / 60).toFixed(1) : "0"; var line = [ts, decision, fare, ppm, pph, tripMi, pickupMi, pickupMin, rating, verified, exclusive, incentive, rideType, city, pickupAddr, dropoffAddr, dailyEarn, weeklyEarn, chainVal, advantage, idleMin].join(","); writeFile("/sdcard/Tasker/uber_ride_log.csv", line + "\n", true); try { var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open("POST", "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxcy9s94zzWAbC5u-IEH_Pjt2uHUX0AA_z4FQlKelhKDfAHpUiRk7ycHVjqpotUI_IMMQ/exec", false); xhr.setRequestHeader("Content-Type", "application/json"); xhr.send(JSON.stringify({data: line})); } catch(e) {}

if (global("FILTER_ON") !== "1") { exit(); } var count = 200; var texts = []; var ids = []; for (var i = 1; i <= count; i++) { var t = global("ai_text(" + i + ")"); var id = global("ai_id(" + i + ")"); if (!t && !id) break; texts.push(t || ""); ids.push(id || ""); } var earnText = ""; var tripsText = ""; var pointsText = ""; for (var j = 0; j < ids.length; j++) { if (ids[j].indexOf("earnings_tracker_counter_content_status") > -1) { earnText = texts[j]; } if (ids[j].indexOf("summary_details_title") > -1) { tripsText = texts[j]; } if (ids[j].indexOf("summary_details_subtitle") > -1) { pointsText = texts[j]; } } if (!earnText) { for (var k = 0; k < texts.length; k++) { var t2 = (texts[k] || "").trim(); if (/^\$[\d,]+\.?\d*$/.test(t2)) { earnText = t2; break; } } } if (earnText) { var em = earnText.match(/\$?([\d,.]+)/); if (em) em[1] = em[1].replace(/,/g, ""); if (em) setGlobal("DAILY_EARN", em[1]); } if (tripsText) { var tm2 = tripsText.match(/(\d+)/); if (tm2) setGlobal("DAILY_TRIPS", tm2[1]); } if (pointsText) { var pm2 = pointsText.match(/(\d+)/); if (pm2) setGlobal("DAILY_POINTS", pm2[1]); } var shiftStart = parseInt(global("SHIFT_START_TIME") || "0"); var nowSec = parseInt(global("TIMES") || "0"); if (shiftStart > 0 && nowSec > shiftStart) { var hoursOnline = (nowSec - shiftStart) / 3600; var earn = parseFloat(global("DAILY_EARN") || "0"); if (hoursOnline > 0) { setGlobal("EARN_RATE", (earn / hoursOnline).toFixed(2)); } } setGlobal("DEBUG_MSG", "EARNINGS_SYNC: earn=" + (global("DAILY_EARN") || "?") + " trips=" + (global("DAILY_TRIPS") || "?") + " rate=" + (global("EARN_RATE") || "?")); writeFile("/sdcard/Tasker/v3_debug.log", new Date().toISOString() + " | " + global("DEBUG_MSG") + " ", true);

var fare = global("CURRENT_FARE") || "0"; var mi = global("CURRENT_MILES") || "0"; var city = global("OFFER_CITY") || ""; var tripMin = global("OFFER_TRIP_MIN") || "0"; var msg = "Passenger in. " + fare + " dollar ride"; if (parseFloat(mi) > 0) msg += ", " + mi + " miles"; if (city) msg += " to " + city; if (parseInt(tripMin) > 0) msg += ". " + tripMin + " minutes estimated"; msg += "."; setGlobal("TTS_TEXT", msg); setGlobal("TTS_PRIORITY", "2");

setGlobal("DEBUG_MSG", "ONLINE_HANDLER: NTITLE=" + (global("NTITLE") || "none") + " NTEXT=" + (global("NTEXT") || "none")); writeFile("/sdcard/Tasker/v3_debug.log", new Date().toISOString() + " | " + global("DEBUG_MSG") + " ", true); var shiftStart = global("SHIFT_START_TIME"); if (!shiftStart || shiftStart === "0" || shiftStart === "undefined") { setGlobal("SHIFT_START_TIME", global("TIMES") || "0"); } setGlobal("IDLE_SINCE", global("TIMES") || "0"); setGlobal("LAST_IDLE_ADVICE_MIN", "0"); setGlobal("CONSECUTIVE_DECLINES", "0");

var earn = global("DAILY_EARN") || "0"; var trips = global("DAILY_TRIPS") || "0"; var shiftStart = parseInt(global("SHIFT_START_TIME") || "0"); var nowSec = parseInt(global("TIMES") || "0"); var hours = shiftStart > 0 ? ((nowSec - shiftStart) / 3600).toFixed(1) : "0"; var rate = global("EARN_RATE") || "0"; var msg = "Offline. "; if (parseFloat(earn) > 0) { msg += Math.round(parseFloat(earn)) + " dollars, " + trips + " trips"; if (parseFloat(hours) > 0) msg += ", " + hours + " hours"; if (parseFloat(rate) > 0) msg += ". " + rate + " per hour"; msg += ". "; } msg += "Filter disabled. Good work."; setGlobal("TTS_TEXT", msg); setGlobal("TTS_PRIORITY", "4"); setGlobal("SHIFT_BRIEFING_DONE", "0"); setGlobal("DAILY_EARN", "0"); setGlobal("DAILY_TRIPS", "0"); setGlobal("DAILY_POINTS", "0"); setGlobal("EARN_RATE", "0"); setGlobal("SHIFT_START_TIME", "0"); setGlobal("MILESTONE_100", "0"); setGlobal("MILESTONE_150", "0"); setGlobal("MILESTONE_200", "0"); setGlobal("MILESTONE_250", "0"); setGlobal("MILESTONE_300", "0"); setGlobal("GOAL_ANNOUNCED", "0"); setGlobal("WARN_8H", "0"); setGlobal("WARN_10H", "0"); setGlobal("CONSECUTIVE_DECLINES", "0"); setGlobal("IDLE_SINCE", "0"); setGlobal("LAST_IDLE_ADVICE_MIN", "0"); setGlobal("OFFER_PROCESSING", "0"); setGlobal("WATCHDOG_ACTIVE", "0"); performTask("Weekly Calibration", 5); setGlobal("CHAIN_ADVANTAGE_ACCEPT", "5"); setGlobal("CHAIN_ADVANTAGE_DECLINE", "-3");

var decision = global("OFFER_DECISION") || "DECLINE"; var fare = global("OFFER_FARE") || "0"; var ppm = global("OFFER_PER_MILE") || "0"; var city = global("OFFER_CITY") || ""; var reason = global("OFFER_REASON") || ""; var badge = global("OFFER_BADGE") || ""; var verified = global("OFFER_VERIFIED") || ""; var rating = global("OFFER_RATING") || ""; var pickupMin = global("OFFER_PICKUP_MIN") || "0"; var incentive = parseFloat(global("OFFER_INCENTIVE") || "0"); var chainVal = global("OFFER_CHAIN_VALUE") || ""; var tripMi = global("OFFER_TRIP_MI") || "0"; var msg = ""; if (decision === "ACCEPT") { msg = "Accepted. "; if (badge === "Exclusive") msg = "Accepted exclusive. "; msg += Math.round(parseFloat(fare)) + " dollars"; var totalMi = global("OFFER_TOTAL_MILES") || "0"; var effRate = global("OFFER_EFFECTIVE_RATE") || "0"; if (parseFloat(ppm) > 0) msg += ", " + ppm + " per mile"; if (parseFloat(totalMi) > 0) msg += ", " + totalMi + " total miles"; if (parseFloat(tripMi) > 0) msg += ", " + tripMi + " miles"; var lmDrop = global("LANDMARK_DROPOFF_SHORT") || ""; if (lmDrop && lmDrop !== "undefined" && lmDrop.length > 3) { msg += " to " + lmDrop; } else if (city) { msg += " to " + city; } var lmPick = global("LANDMARK_PICKUP_SHORT") || ""; if (lmPick && lmPick !== "undefined" && lmPick.length > 3) { msg += ". Pickup " + pickupMin + " minutes at " + lmPick; } else if (parseInt(pickupMin) > 0) { msg += ". Pickup " + pickupMin + " minutes"; } if (incentive > 0) msg += ". Plus " + incentive.toFixed(2) + " incentive"; if (verified === "Verified" && parseFloat(rating) > 0) msg += ". Verified rider, " + rating; if (chainVal && parseFloat(chainVal) > 0) { var adv = parseFloat(global("OFFER_CHAIN_ADVANTAGE") || "0"); if (adv > 5) msg += ". Good positioning ride"; } msg += "."; } else { msg = "Declined. "; if (reason) msg += reason + "."; else msg += Math.round(parseFloat(fare)) + " dollars."; } setGlobal("TTS_TEXT", msg);

var earn = global("DAILY_EARN") || "0"; var trips = global("DAILY_TRIPS") || "0"; var rate = global("EARN_RATE") || "0"; var city = global("OFFER_CITY") || global("CURRENT_CITY") || ""; var msg = "Trip complete. "; msg += Math.round(parseFloat(earn)) + " dollars, " + trips + " trips."; if (parseFloat(rate) > 0) msg += " " + parseFloat(rate).toFixed(0) + " per hour."; if (city) { var chainValues = {}; try { chainValues = JSON.parse(global("CHAIN_VALUES_JSON") || "{}"); } catch(e) {} var hour = new Date().getHours(); var key = city + ":" + hour; var cv = chainValues[key] || parseFloat(global("DEFAULT_CHAIN_VALUE") || "20"); if (cv > 30) { msg += " " + city + ". Great spot. Hold here."; } else if (cv >= 20) { msg += " " + city + ". Decent area."; } else { msg += " " + city + ". Cold area."; } } setGlobal("TTS_TEXT", msg);

var earn = global("DAILY_EARN") || "0"; var trips = global("DAILY_TRIPS") || "0"; var weekly = global("WEEKLY_EARN") || "0"; var rating = global("DRIVER_RATING") || ""; var procard = global("PROCARD_BAL") || ""; var goal = global("SHIFT_GOAL") || "220"; var earnNum = parseFloat(earn); var msg = ""; if (earnNum > 0) { msg = "Online. " + Math.round(parseFloat(earn)) + " dollars so far, " + trips + " trips. "; } else { msg = "Good evening. Starting shift. "; } if (parseFloat(weekly) > 0) { msg += "Weekly " + Math.round(parseFloat(weekly)) + " dollars"; var wTrips = global("WEEKLY_TRIPS"); if (wTrips && wTrips !== "undefined" && wTrips !== "0") msg += ", " + wTrips + " trips"; var onTime = global("ONLINE_TIME"); if (onTime && onTime !== "undefined") msg += ", " + onTime + " online"; msg += ". "; } if (procard) msg += "Pro card " + Math.round(parseFloat(procard)) + " dollars. "; if (rating) msg += "Rating " + rating + ". "; var dPts = global("DAILY_POINTS"); if (dPts && dPts !== "undefined" && dPts !== "0") msg += dPts + " points today. "; msg += "Goal " + goal + " dollars."; setGlobal("TTS_TEXT", msg); setGlobal("TTS_PRIORITY", "4");

var pickup = global("OFFER_PICKUP_ADDRESS") || ""; var dropoff = global("OFFER_DROPOFF_ADDRESS") || ""; function cleanForTTS(addr) { if (!addr) return ""; var clean = addr.replace(/&/g, " and "); clean = clean.replace(/,?\s*(CA|California)\s*\d{0,5}\s*$/i, ""); clean = clean.replace(/\bSt\b/g, "Street"); clean = clean.replace(/\bAve\b/g, "Avenue"); clean = clean.replace(/\bBlvd\b/g, "Boulevard"); clean = clean.replace(/\bDr\b/g, "Drive"); clean = clean.replace(/\bLn\b/g, "Lane"); clean = clean.replace(/\bPl\b/g, "Place"); clean = clean.replace(/\bCt\b/g, "Court"); return clean.trim(); } function shortName(addr) { if (!addr) return ""; var parts = addr.split(","); return parts[0].replace(/&/g, " and ").trim(); } setGlobal("LANDMARK_PICKUP", cleanForTTS(pickup)); setGlobal("LANDMARK_DROPOFF", cleanForTTS(dropoff)); setGlobal("LANDMARK_PICKUP_SHORT", shortName(pickup)); setGlobal("LANDMARK_DROPOFF_SHORT", shortName(dropoff));

if (global("FILTER_ON") !== "1") { exit(); } var lat = global("LOC_LAT") || ""; var lon = global("LOC_LONG") || ""; if (!lat || !lon || lat === "0" || lon === "0") { exit(); } var lastDropoff = global("OFFER_DROPOFF_ADDRESS") || ""; if (lastDropoff) { var parts = lastDropoff.split(","); var city = parts[parts.length - 1].trim(); city = city.replace(/\s*(CA|California)\s*\d*/i, "").trim(); if (city.length < 3 && parts.length > 1) { city = parts[parts.length - 2].trim(); } if (city.length > 2) { setGlobal("CURRENT_CITY", city); setGlobal("CURRENT_LAT", lat); setGlobal("CURRENT_LON", lon); setGlobal("CITY_FOUND", "1"); } } if (global("CITY_FOUND") !== "1") { var url = "https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/reverse?format=json&lat=" + lat + "&lon=" + lon + "&zoom=12"; setGlobal("GEOCODE_URL", url); }

var geocodeUrl = global("GEOCODE_URL") || ""; if (geocodeUrl && geocodeUrl !== "undefined" && geocodeUrl.length > 10) { try { var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open("GET", geocodeUrl, false); xhr.setRequestHeader("User-Agent", "UberFilterV3/1.0"); xhr.send(); if (xhr.status === 200) { var j = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText); var addr = j.address || {}; var city = addr.city || addr.town || addr.village || addr.hamlet || ""; if (city.length > 2) { setGlobal("CURRENT_CITY", city); } } } catch(e) {} } setGlobal("CURRENT_LAT", global("LOC_LAT") || "0"); setGlobal("CURRENT_LON", global("LOC_LONG") || "0"); setGlobal("CITY_FOUND", "0"); setGlobal("GEOCODE_URL", "");

if ((global("PASSENGER_IN") || "0") === "1") { exit(); } if ((global("FILTER_ON") || "0") !== "1") { exit(); } var lat = parseFloat(global("LOC_LAT") || "0"); var lon = parseFloat(global("LOC_LONG") || "0"); if (lat === 0 || lon === 0) { exit(); } var lastLat = parseFloat(global("DEADHEAD_LAST_LAT") || "0"); var lastLon = parseFloat(global("DEADHEAD_LAST_LON") || "0"); if (lastLat === 0) { setGlobal("DEADHEAD_LAST_LAT", lat.toString()); setGlobal("DEADHEAD_LAST_LON", lon.toString()); exit(); } var R = 3959; var dLat = (lat - lastLat) * Math.PI / 180; var dLon = (lon - lastLon) * Math.PI / 180; var a = Math.sin(dLat/2) * Math.sin(dLat/2) + Math.cos(lastLat * Math.PI / 180) * Math.cos(lat * Math.PI / 180) * Math.sin(dLon/2) * Math.sin(dLon/2); var seg = R * 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a)); if (seg > 0.01) { var total = parseFloat(global("DEADHEAD_MI") || "0") + seg; setGlobal("DEADHEAD_MI", total.toFixed(2)); } setGlobal("DEADHEAD_LAST_LAT", lat.toString()); setGlobal("DEADHEAD_LAST_LON", lon.toString());

if ((global("FILTER_ON") || "0") !== "1") { exit(); } if ((global("PASSENGER_IN") || "0") === "1") { exit(); } var lastSurge = parseInt(global("SURGE_LAST_TIME") || "0"); var now = parseInt(global("TIMES") || "0"); if (now - lastSurge < 480) { exit(); } var nTitle = (global("NTITLE") || "").toLowerCase(); var nText = (global("NTEXT") || "").toLowerCase(); var combined = nTitle + " " + nText; var knownCities = ["newport beach","huntington beach","irvine","anaheim", "fullerton","costa mesa","laguna beach","dana point","mission viejo", "santa ana","seal beach","tustin","lake forest","san clemente", "rancho santa margarita","ladera ranch","aliso viejo","laguna niguel"]; var boosted = []; for (var i = 0; i < knownCities.length; i++) { if (combined.indexOf(knownCities[i]) > -1) { boosted.push(knownCities[i].replace(/\b\w/g, function(c) { return c.toUpperCase(); })); } } if (boosted.length === 0) { var current = global("CURRENT_CITY") || ""; if (current) boosted.push(current); } if (boosted.length > 0) { try { var chainValues = JSON.parse(global("CHAIN_VALUES_JSON") || "{}"); var hour = new Date().getHours(); for (var j = 0; j < boosted.length; j++) { var key = boosted[j] + ":" + hour; var current_val = chainValues[key] || 20; chainValues[key] = Math.min(Math.round(current_val * 1.25), current_val + 10); } setGlobal("CHAIN_VALUES_JSON", JSON.stringify(chainValues)); } catch(e) {} var names = boosted.join(" and "); var rateCtx = ""; var rate = parseFloat(global("EARN_RATE") || "0"); if (rate > 0) rateCtx = " You are making " + rate.toFixed(0) + " an hour."; setGlobal("TTS_TEXT", "Surge detected near " + names + ". Demand picking up." + rateCtx); setGlobal("TTS_PRIORITY", "3"); } setGlobal("SURGE_LAST_TIME", now.toString());

if ((global("FILTER_ON") || "0") !== "1") { exit(); } var earn = parseFloat(global("DAILY_EARN") || "0"); var shiftStart = parseInt(global("SHIFT_START_TIME") || "0"); var now = parseInt(global("TIMES") || "0"); var hoursOnline = shiftStart > 0 ? (now - shiftStart) / 3600 : 0; var rate = parseFloat(global("EARN_RATE") || "0"); var goal = parseFloat(global("SHIFT_GOAL") || "220"); var consecutiveDeclines = parseInt(global("CONSECUTIVE_DECLINES") || "0"); var msg = ""; var milestones = [ {amt: 100, key: "MILESTONE_100", text: "100 dollars. Halfway to goal."}, {amt: 150, key: "MILESTONE_150", text: "150 dollars. On pace."}, {amt: 200, key: "MILESTONE_200", text: "200 dollars. Goal in reach."}, {amt: 250, key: "MILESTONE_250", text: "250 dollars. Strong night. 300 is in reach."}, {amt: 300, key: "MILESTONE_300", text: "300 dollars. Consider wrapping up."} ]; for (var i = 0; i < milestones.length; i++) { var m = milestones[i]; if (earn >= m.amt && global(m.key) !== "1") { msg = "Milestone. " + m.text; setGlobal(m.key, "1"); break; } } if (!msg && hoursOnline >= 10) { var h10 = global("WARN_10H") || "0"; if (h10 !== "1") { msg = "Warning. 10 hours online. You are pushing it. Consider stopping."; setGlobal("WARN_10H", "1"); } } else if (!msg && hoursOnline >= 8) { var h8 = global("WARN_8H") || "0"; if (h8 !== "1") { msg = "8 hours online. Take a break soon."; setGlobal("WARN_8H", "1"); } } if (!msg && consecutiveDeclines >= 4) { msg = consecutiveDeclines + " declines in a row. Acceptance rate may be affected. Consider lowering thresholds."; } if (!msg && hoursOnline > 0.5 && rate > 0 && rate < 14) { msg = "Last period only " + rate.toFixed(0) + " per hour. The rush may be over."; } if (!msg && earn >= goal) { var goalAnnounced = global("GOAL_ANNOUNCED") || "0"; if (goalAnnounced !== "1") { var trips = global("DAILY_TRIPS") || "0"; msg = earn.toFixed(0) + " dollars. Goal reached. " + trips + " trips, " + hoursOnline.toFixed(1) + " hours. " + rate.toFixed(0) + " per hour. Continue or go offline?"; setGlobal("GOAL_ANNOUNCED", "1"); } } if (msg) { setGlobal("TTS_TEXT", msg); setGlobal("TTS_PRIORITY", "4"); }

var filterOn = global("FILTER_ON") || "0"; var mode = global("TTS_MODE") || "normal"; var earn = global("DAILY_EARN") || "0"; var trips = global("DAILY_TRIPS") || "0"; var rate = global("EARN_RATE") || "0"; var city = global("CURRENT_CITY") || "Unknown"; var passenger = global("PASSENGER_IN") || "0"; var status = "Filter: " + (filterOn === "1" ? "ON" : "OFF"); status += " | TTS: " + mode; status += " | $" + earn + " / " + trips + " trips"; if (parseFloat(rate) > 0) status += " | $" + parseFloat(rate).toFixed(0) + "/hr"; status += " | " + city; if (passenger === "1") status += " | IN TRIP"; setGlobal("STATUS_DISPLAY", status);

var earn = global("DAILY_EARN") || "0"; var trips = global("DAILY_TRIPS") || "0"; var shiftStart = parseInt(global("SHIFT_START_TIME") || "0"); var now = parseInt(global("TIMES") || "0"); var hours = shiftStart > 0 ? ((now - shiftStart) / 3600).toFixed(1) : "0"; setGlobal("TTS_TEXT", "Going offline. " + Math.round(parseFloat(earn)) + " dollars in " + trips + " trips over " + hours + " hours."); setGlobal("TTS_PRIORITY", "4");

if ((global("FILTER_ON") || "0") !== "1") { exit(); } var hour = new Date().getHours(); var isPeak = (hour >= 21 || hour <= 2); var currentPref = global("DELIVERY_MODE") || "auto"; var wantDeliveries = !isPeak; var haveDeliveries = (currentPref === "on"); if (wantDeliveries === haveDeliveries) { exit(); } setGlobal("PREF_WANT_DELIVERIES", wantDeliveries ? "1" : "0"); setGlobal("PREF_CHANGE_NEEDED", "1");

var want = global("PREF_WANT_DELIVERIES") || "0"; setGlobal("DELIVERY_MODE", want === "1" ? "on" : "off"); setGlobal("PREF_CHANGE_NEEDED", "0"); var msg = want === "1" ? "Deliveries enabled. Slow period." : "Deliveries disabled. Peak rideshare hours."; setGlobal("TTS_TEXT", msg); setGlobal("TTS_PRIORITY", "4");

var count = 200; var texts = [], ids = []; for (var i = 1; i <= count; i++) { var t = global("ai_text(" + i + ")"); var id = global("ai_id(" + i + ")"); if (!t && !id) break; texts.push(t || ""); ids.push(id || ""); } var weeklyTotal = ""; for (var j = 0; j < ids.length; j++) { if (ids[j].indexOf("ub__text") > -1 && texts[j].indexOf("$") > -1) { weeklyTotal = texts[j]; break; } } var online_time = "", active_time = "", weekly_trips = "", weekly_points = ""; for (var k = 0; k < texts.length; k++) { var t2 = (texts[k] || "").trim(); if (/^\d+ h \d+ m$/.test(t2) && !online_time) online_time = t2; else if (/^\d+ h \d+ m$/.test(t2) && online_time && !active_time) active_time = t2; if (t2 === "Trips" && k+1 < texts.length) weekly_trips = texts[k-1] || ""; if (t2 === "Points" && k+1 < texts.length) weekly_points = texts[k-1] || ""; } var procard = ""; for (var m = 0; m < texts.length; m++) { var t3 = (texts[m] || "").trim(); if (/^\$\d{2,}\.?\d*$/.test(t3) && t3 !== weeklyTotal) { procard = t3; break; } } if (weeklyTotal) { var wm = weeklyTotal.match(/\$?([\d.]+)/); if (wm) setGlobal("WEEKLY_EARN", wm[1]); } if (weekly_trips) setGlobal("WEEKLY_TRIPS", weekly_trips); if (online_time) setGlobal("ONLINE_TIME", online_time); if (active_time) setGlobal("ACTIVE_TIME", active_time); if (weekly_points) setGlobal("WEEKLY_POINTS", weekly_points); if (procard) { var pm = procard.match(/\$?([\d.]+)/); if (pm) setGlobal("PROCARD_BAL", pm[1]); }

var dzCount = global("DEMAND_ZONE_COUNT") || "0"; if (dzCount === "0" || dzCount === "undefined") { var shiftSecs = parseInt(global("TIMES") || "0") - parseInt(global("SHIFT_START_TIME") || "0"); if (shiftSecs > 30) { performTask("Demand Zone Reader", 8); } } if ((global("FILTER_ON") || "0") !== "1") { exit(); } if ((global("PASSENGER_IN") || "0") === "1") { exit(); } var idleSince = parseInt(global("IDLE_SINCE") || "0"); var now = parseInt(global("TIMES") || "0"); if (idleSince === 0) { exit(); } var idleMin = Math.floor((now - idleSince) / 60); var lastAdvice = parseInt(global("LAST_IDLE_ADVICE_MIN") || "0"); var thresholds = [3, 5, 8, 12, 15]; var threshold = 0; for (var i = thresholds.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { if (idleMin >= thresholds[i] && lastAdvice < thresholds[i]) { threshold = thresholds[i]; break; } } if (threshold === 0) { exit(); } var city = global("CURRENT_CITY") || "here"; var chainValues = {}; try { chainValues = JSON.parse(global("CHAIN_VALUES_JSON") || "{}"); } catch(e) {} var hour = new Date().getHours(); var currentCV = chainValues[city + ":" + hour] || 20; var bestCity = city; var repoTarget30 = global("REPOSITION_TARGET"); if (repoTarget30 && repoTarget30 !== "undefined" && repoTarget30.length > 2) bestCity = repoTarget30; var dz30 = []; try { dz30 = JSON.parse(global("DEMAND_ZONES_JSON") || "[]"); } catch(edz30) {} if (dz30.length > 0 && dz30[0].name) bestCity = dz30[0].name; var bestCV = currentCV; var allKeys = Object.keys(chainValues); for (var j = 0; j < allKeys.length; j++) { var parts = allKeys[j].split(":"); if (parseInt(parts[1]) === hour && chainValues[allKeys[j]] > bestCV) { bestCV = chainValues[allKeys[j]]; bestCity = parts[0]; } } var msg = ""; if (threshold === 3) { if (currentCV > 25) { msg = "Waiting 3 minutes. " + city + " is good right now. Hold."; } else { msg = "Waiting 3 minutes. " + city + " is slow. Consider moving."; } } else if (threshold === 5) { msg = "5 minutes idle. "; if (bestCity !== city && bestCV > currentCV + 5) { msg += "Head toward " + bestCity + ". " + bestCV + " per hour there."; } else { msg += city + ". Give it a few more minutes."; } } else if (threshold === 8) { msg = "8 minutes idle. " + city + " is cold right now. "; if (bestCity !== city) { msg += "Best option " + bestCity + " at " + bestCV + " per hour."; } else { msg += "No better areas detected."; } } else if (threshold === 12) { msg = "12 minutes no offers. Consider toggling deliveries temporarily. Or reposition to a busier area."; } else if (threshold === 15) { msg = "15 minutes idle. Burning clock. Take the next offer regardless"; if (bestCity !== city) { msg += " or head to " + bestCity + "."; } else { msg += "."; } } if (msg) { setGlobal("TTS_TEXT", msg); setGlobal("TTS_PRIORITY", "3"); setGlobal("LAST_IDLE_ADVICE_MIN", threshold.toString()); } if (msg) { setGlobal("DEBUG_MSG", "IDLE_ADVICE: min=" + idleMin + " threshold=" + threshold + " city=" + city + " bestCity=" + bestCity + " msg=" + msg.substring(0, 60)); writeFile("/sdcard/Tasker/v3_debug.log", new Date().toISOString() + " | " + global("DEBUG_MSG") + " ", true); }

var count = 200; var texts = []; for (var i = 1; i <= count; i++) { var t = global("ai_text(" + i + ")"); if (!t || t === "undefined") break; texts.push(t.trim()); } if (texts.length === 0) { var raw = global("ai_texts"); if (raw && raw !== "undefined") { texts = raw.split(","); for (var z = 0; z < texts.length; z++) texts[z] = (texts[z] || "").trim(); } } var navWords = {"Home":1,"Discover":1,"Earnings":1,"Inbox":1,"Menu":1,"Go Online":1,"Ready to go?":1,"Discover opportunities":1,"Promotions":1,"Saved":1,"New":1,"Save":1,"Sign up":1,"Map":1}; var dayLetters = {"M":1,"T":1,"W":1,"S":1,"F":1}; var upcoming = []; var i = 0; while (i < texts.length) { var t = texts[i]; if (!t || t.length < 3 || navWords[t] || (t.length <= 2 && (dayLetters[t] || !isNaN(parseInt(t))))) { i++; continue; } var isTimeWindow = /^\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s*(AM|PM)\s*-\s*\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s*(AM|PM)$/i.test(t); if (isTimeWindow) { var card = {timeWindow: t, items: [], tags: []}; for (var j = i + 1; j < texts.length; j++) { var nt = texts[j]; if (!nt || navWords[nt] || (nt.length <= 2 && (dayLetters[nt] || !isNaN(parseInt(nt))))) continue; var nextIsTime = /^\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s*(AM|PM)\s*-/i.test(nt); if (nextIsTime || nt === "Sign up") break; if (nt.indexOf("Extra $") > -1) card.amount = nt; else if (nt === "Boost+" || nt === "Rides only" || nt === "Airport" || nt === "Deliveries") card.tags.push(nt); else if (nt.indexOf("Applied per") > -1 || nt.indexOf("Based on") > -1) card.terms = nt; else if (nt.indexOf("mi away") > -1) card.distance = nt; else if (nt.indexOf("Earnings") > -1 && nt.indexOf("Very") > -1) card.demand = nt; else if (nt.indexOf("Peak") > -1 || nt.indexOf("SNA") > -1 || nt.indexOf("flight") > -1) card.event = nt; else card.items.push(nt); } var category = "promotion"; if (card.event) category = "airport"; if (card.tags.indexOf("Airport") > -1) category = "airport_promotion"; var title = (card.amount || card.event || t); var detail = card.tags.join(", "); if (card.distance) detail += (detail ? " | " : "") + card.distance; if (card.demand) detail += (detail ? " | " : "") + card.demand; upcoming.push({name: category, source: "uber", title: title, timeWindow: t, detail: detail, tags: card.tags, amount: card.amount || "", raw: t + " " + title + " " + detail}); i = j; continue; } if (t.indexOf("Peak") > -1 || t.indexOf("flight") > -1 || t.indexOf("SNA") > -1) { var detail2 = ""; if (i + 1 < texts.length && texts[i+1] && texts[i+1].length > 5 && !navWords[texts[i+1]]) detail2 = texts[i+1]; upcoming.push({name: "airport", source: "uber", title: t, detail: detail2, raw: t + " " + detail2}); i += detail2 ? 2 : 1; continue; } if (t.indexOf("Opportunity") > -1 && t !== "Discover opportunities") { var detail3 = ""; if (i + 1 < texts.length && texts[i+1] && texts[i+1].length > 5) detail3 = texts[i+1]; upcoming.push({name: "opportunity", source: "uber", title: t, detail: detail3, raw: t + " " + detail3}); i += detail3 ? 2 : 1; continue; } i++; } var now = new Date(); var nowMin = now.getHours() * 60 + now.getMinutes(); if (t.indexOf("Earnings Trends") > -1 || t.indexOf("best times") > -1 || t.indexOf("Explore the") > -1) { var etDetail = ""; if (i + 1 < texts.length && texts[i+1] && texts[i+1].length > 5 && !navWords[texts[i+1]]) etDetail = texts[i+1]; upcoming.push({name: "earnings_trend", source: "uber", title: t, detail: etDetail, raw: t + " " + etDetail}); if (etDetail) i += 2; else i++; continue; } } var barMin = 2 * 60; var diffToBar = barMin - nowMin; if (diffToBar < 0) diffToBar += 1440; if (diffToBar <= 120 && diffToBar > 0) { upcoming.push({name: "bar_close", source: "clock", title: "Bar close in " + diffToBar + " minutes", detail: "Newport Beach, Huntington Beach, Fullerton", raw: "bar close"}); } setGlobal("UPCOMING_EVENTS", JSON.stringify(upcoming)); setGlobal("EVENT_COUNT", upcoming.length.toString()); setGlobal("DEBUG_MSG", "EVENTS: count=" + upcoming.length + " events=" + JSON.stringify(upcoming).substring(0, 100)); writeFile("/sdcard/Tasker/v3_debug.log", new Date().toISOString() + " | " + global("DEBUG_MSG") + " ", true);

var now = new Date(); var hour = now.getHours(); var dow = now.getDay(); var dayNames = ["Sunday","Monday","Tuesday","Wednesday","Thursday","Friday","Saturday"]; var dayName = dayNames[dow]; var isWeekend = (dow === 5 || dow === 6); var goal = global("SHIFT_GOAL") || "220"; var events = []; try { events = JSON.parse(global("UPCOMING_EVENTS") || "[]"); } catch(e) {} var cityStats = {}; try { cityStats = JSON.parse(global("CITY_STATS_JSON") || "{}"); } catch(e) {} var phases = []; var phase = 1; if (hour < 22) { var earlyBest = "South Orange County"; var dz32 = []; try { dz32 = JSON.parse(global("DEMAND_ZONES_JSON") || "[]"); } catch(e32) {} if (dz32.length > 0 && dz32[0].name) earlyBest = dz32[0].name; var cs32 = {}; try { cs32 = JSON.parse(global("CITY_STATS_JSON") || "{}"); } catch(e33) {} var bestPH32 = 0; var bestCity32 = ""; var ckeys32 = Object.keys(cs32); for (var ci = 0; ci < ckeys32.length; ci++) { var cst = cs32[ckeys32[ci]]; if (cst && cst.avg_per_hour > bestPH32) { bestPH32 = cst.avg_per_hour; bestCity32 = ckeys32[ci]; } } if (bestCity32) earlyBest = bestCity32; for (var i = 0; i < events.length; i++) { if (events[i].name === "airport" || events[i].name === "airport_promotion") { earlyBest = "SNA corridor"; break; } } phases.push("Phase " + phase + ", " + hour + " to 10: " + earlyBest + "."); phase++; } if (hour < 24) { var lateBest = isWeekend ? "Newport Beach and Huntington Beach" : "Newport Beach"; phases.push("Phase " + phase + ", 10 to midnight: " + lateBest + ". Bar scene starting."); phase++; } phases.push("Phase " + phase + ", midnight to 2: Accept aggressively. All cities boosted."); phase++; var barClose = false; for (var j = 0; j < events.length; j++) { if (events[j].name === "bar_close") { barClose = true; break; } } if (barClose || hour < 3) { phases.push("Phase " + phase + ", 1:30 to 2:30: Bar close surge. Newport, HB, Fullerton."); } var msg = dayName + " night plan. "; for (var k = 0; k < phases.length; k++) { msg += phases[k] + " "; } msg += "Goal " + goal + " dollars."; var avgForDay = global("AVG_" + dayName.toUpperCase()) || ""; if (avgForDay) { msg += " " + dayName + "s you average " + avgForDay + "."; } setGlobal("TTS_TEXT", msg); setGlobal("TTS_PRIORITY", "3"); setGlobal("SHIFT_PLAN_PHASE", "1"); setGlobal("SHIFT_PLAN_JSON", JSON.stringify(phases));

if ((global("FILTER_ON") || "0") !== "1") { exit(); } var city = global("CURRENT_CITY") || "Unknown"; var earn = parseFloat(global("DAILY_EARN") || "0"); var shiftStart = parseInt(global("SHIFT_START_TIME") || "0"); var now = parseInt(global("TIMES") || "0"); var hoursOnline = shiftStart > 0 ? (now - shiftStart) / 3600 : 0; var rate = hoursOnline > 0 ? earn / hoursOnline : 0; var target = parseFloat(global("SHIFT_GOAL") || "220") / 7; // target per hour var hour = new Date().getHours(); var consecutiveDeclines = parseInt(global("CONSECUTIVE_DECLINES") || "0"); var chainValues = {}; try { chainValues = JSON.parse(global("CHAIN_VALUES_JSON") || "{}"); } catch(e) {} var currentCV = chainValues[city + ":" + hour] || 20; var bestCity = city; var bestCV = currentCV; var allKeys = Object.keys(chainValues); for (var i = 0; i < allKeys.length; i++) { var parts = allKeys[i].split(":"); if (parseInt(parts[1]) === hour && chainValues[allKeys[i]] > bestCV) { bestCV = chainValues[allKeys[i]]; bestCity = parts[0]; } } var msg = ""; if (rate > target && currentCV > 25) { msg = city + " at " + hour + " o'clock. " + rate.toFixed(0) + " per hour. Ahead of pace. Hold here."; } else if (hoursOnline > 1 && rate < target * 0.8) { if (bestCity !== city && bestCV > currentCV + 8) { msg = "Replan. " + city + " is slow tonight. " + rate.toFixed(0) + " per hour. Pivot to " + bestCity + ". " + bestCV + " expected there."; setGlobal("REPOSITION_TARGET", bestCity); } else { msg = rate.toFixed(0) + " per hour. Below target. Adjusting thresholds down."; var currentThresh = parseFloat(global("CHAIN_ADVANTAGE_ACCEPT") || "5"); if (currentThresh > 2) { setGlobal("CHAIN_ADVANTAGE_ACCEPT", (currentThresh - 1).toString()); } } } else if (consecutiveDeclines >= 3 && bestCity !== city) { msg = consecutiveDeclines + " consecutive declines in " + city + ". Demand may have shifted. Consider " + bestCity + "."; } var eventCount = parseInt(global("EVENT_COUNT") || "0"); var dz33 = []; try { dz33 = JSON.parse(global("DEMAND_ZONES_JSON") || "[]"); } catch(edz) {} var plan33 = []; try { plan33 = JSON.parse(global("SHIFT_PLAN_JSON") || "[]"); } catch(ep) {} if (dz33.length > 0 && !msg) { var hotZone = dz33[0].name || ""; if (hotZone && hotZone !== city) { msg = "Demand active in " + hotZone + ". Consider heading there."; } } if (eventCount > 0 && !msg) { try { var events = JSON.parse(global("UPCOMING_EVENTS") || "[]"); if (events.length > 0 && events[0].title) { msg = "Upcoming: " + events[0].title + (events[0].detail ? ". " + events[0].detail : ""); } } catch(e) {} } if (msg) { setGlobal("TTS_TEXT", msg); setGlobal("TTS_PRIORITY", "3"); }

var cityStats = {}; try { cityStats = JSON.parse(global("CITY_STATS_JSON") || "{}"); } catch(e) {} var cities = Object.keys(cityStats); var bestCity = ""; var bestRate = 0; var worstCity = ""; var worstRate = 999; for (var i = 0; i < cities.length; i++) { var cs = cityStats[cities[i]]; if (cs && cs.avg_per_hour > bestRate && cs.trips >= 3) { bestRate = cs.avg_per_hour; bestCity = cities[i]; } if (cs && cs.avg_per_hour < worstRate && cs.trips >= 3) { worstRate = cs.avg_per_hour; worstCity = cities[i]; } } var msg = "Weekly calibration complete. " + cities.length + " cities profiled. "; if (bestCity) msg += "Best: " + bestCity + " at " + bestRate.toFixed(0) + " per hour. "; if (worstCity) msg += "Weakest: " + worstCity + " at " + worstRate.toFixed(0) + ". "; msg += "Chain values updated."; setGlobal("TTS_TEXT", msg); setGlobal("TTS_PRIORITY", "4");

var data = readFile("/sdcard/Tasker/uber_ride_log.csv") || ""; if (!data || data.length < 20) { setGlobal("CITY_STATS_JSON", "{}"); exit(); } var lines = data.replace(/\r/g, "").split("\n"); var weekAgo = new Date(new Date().getTime() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000); var cityData = {}; for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) { var cols = lines[i].split(","); if (cols.length < 15) continue; var decision = cols[1] || ""; if (decision !== "ACCEPT") continue; var ts = cols[0] || ""; try { var d = new Date(ts); if (isNaN(d.getTime()) || d < weekAgo) continue; } catch(e) { continue; } var fare = parseFloat(cols[2]) || 0; var ppm = parseFloat(cols[3]) || 0; var pph = parseFloat(cols[4]) || 0; var city = (cols[13] || "").trim(); var idleBefore = parseFloat(cols[20]) || 0; var hour = new Date(ts).getHours(); if (!city || city.length < 2) continue; if (!cityData[city]) { cityData[city] = { trips: 0, total_fare: 0, total_ppm: 0, total_pph: 0, total_idle: 0, hours: {} }; } var cd = cityData[city]; cd.trips++; cd.total_fare += fare; cd.total_ppm += ppm; cd.total_pph += pph; cd.total_idle += idleBefore; if (!cd.hours[hour]) cd.hours[hour] = { trips: 0, total_pph: 0 }; cd.hours[hour].trips++; cd.hours[hour].total_pph += pph; } var cityStats = {}; var minTrust = parseInt(global("MIN_TRIPS_FOR_TRUST") || "5"); var cityNames = Object.keys(cityData); for (var j = 0; j < cityNames.length; j++) { var name = cityNames[j]; var cd2 = cityData[name]; var t = cd2.trips; var stats = { trips: t, avg_fare: t > 0 ? parseFloat((cd2.total_fare / t).toFixed(2)) : 0, avg_ppm: t > 0 ? parseFloat((cd2.total_ppm / t).toFixed(2)) : 0, avg_per_hour: t > 0 ? parseFloat((cd2.total_pph / t).toFixed(2)) : 0, avg_idle_after: t > 0 ? parseFloat((cd2.total_idle / t).toFixed(1)) : 5, trusted: t >= minTrust, chain_value_by_hour: {} }; var hours = Object.keys(cd2.hours); var bestPPH = 0; var worstPPH = 999; var bestHours = []; var worstHours = []; for (var k = 0; k < hours.length; k++) { var h = cd2.hours[hours[k]]; var avgH = h.trips > 0 ? h.total_pph / h.trips : 0; stats.chain_value_by_hour[hours[k]] = parseFloat(avgH.toFixed(1)); if (avgH > bestPPH) { bestPPH = avgH; } if (avgH < worstPPH) { worstPPH = avgH; } } for (var m = 0; m < hours.length; m++) { var hv = stats.chain_value_by_hour[hours[m]]; if (hv >= bestPPH * 0.9) bestHours.push(parseInt(hours[m])); if (hv <= worstPPH * 1.1) worstHours.push(parseInt(hours[m])); } stats.best_hours = bestHours; stats.worst_hours = worstHours; cityStats[name] = stats; } setGlobal("CITY_STATS_JSON", JSON.stringify(cityStats));

var cityStats = {}; try { cityStats = JSON.parse(global("CITY_STATS_JSON") || "{}"); } catch(e) {} var chainValues = {}; var defaultCV = parseFloat(global("DEFAULT_CHAIN_VALUE") || "20"); var cityNames = Object.keys(cityStats); for (var i = 0; i < cityNames.length; i++) { var name = cityNames[i]; var cs = cityStats[name]; if (!cs || !cs.chain_value_by_hour) continue; var hours = Object.keys(cs.chain_value_by_hour); for (var j = 0; j < hours.length; j++) { var key = name + ":" + hours[j]; var val = cs.chain_value_by_hour[hours[j]]; if (cs.trusted) { chainValues[key] = val; } else { var trust = parseInt(global("MIN_TRIPS_FOR_TRUST") || "5"); var blended = (val * cs.trips + defaultCV * (trust - cs.trips)) / trust; chainValues[key] = parseFloat(blended.toFixed(1)); } } if (cs.avg_per_hour > 0) { for (var h = 0; h < 24; h++) { var genKey = name + ":" + h; if (!chainValues[genKey]) { chainValues[genKey] = cs.trusted ? cs.avg_per_hour : defaultCV; } } } } setGlobal("CHAIN_VALUES_JSON", JSON.stringify(chainValues));

var mode = global("TTS_MODE"); if (!mode || mode === "undefined") mode = "normal"; var next = "normal"; if (mode === "normal") next = "minimal"; else if (mode === "minimal") next = "verbose"; else if (mode === "verbose") next = "silent"; else next = "normal"; setGlobal("TTS_MODE", next); if (next !== "silent") { performTask("TTS Say", 9, next + " mode."); }

var count = 200; var texts = []; for (var i = 1; i <= count; i++) { var t = global("ai_text(" + i + ")"); if (!t || t === "undefined") break; texts.push(t.trim()); } if (texts.length === 0) { var raw = global("ai_texts"); if (raw && raw !== "undefined") { texts = raw.split(","); for (var z = 0; z < texts.length; z++) texts[z] = (texts[z] || "").trim(); } } var zones = []; var skip = {"Earnings Trends":1, "Colors represent":1, "Hourly trends":1, "See charts":1, "Home":1, "Discover":1, "Earnings":1, "Inbox":1, "Menu":1}; for (var i = 0; i < texts.length; i++) { var t = texts[i]; if (!t || t.length < 4 || skip[t]) continue; if (t.indexOf("County") > -1 || t.indexOf("Beach") > -1 || t.indexOf("Anaheim") > -1 || t.indexOf("Irvine") > -1 || t.indexOf("Fullerton") > -1 || t.indexOf("Orange") > -1 || t.indexOf("Mission") > -1 || t.indexOf("Laguna") > -1 || t.indexOf("Dana") > -1 || t.indexOf("Costa") > -1 || t.indexOf("Santa") > -1 || t.indexOf("Newport") > -1 || t.indexOf("Huntington") > -1 || t.indexOf("Showing") > -1) { var isLive = t.indexOf("Showing") > -1; zones.push({name: t.replace("Showing rides trends", "").trim(), live: isLive}); } } setGlobal("DEMAND_ZONES_JSON", JSON.stringify(zones)); setGlobal("DEMAND_ZONE_COUNT", zones.length.toString()); setGlobal("DEMAND_READING", "0"); setGlobal("DEBUG_MSG", "DEMAND_ZONES: count=" + zones.length + " zones=" + JSON.stringify(zones).substring(0, 100)); writeFile("/sdcard/Tasker/v3_debug.log", new Date().toISOString() + " | " + global("DEBUG_MSG") + " ", true);
var msg = global("DEBUG_MSG") || ""; if (msg && msg !== "undefined") { var ts = new Date().toISOString(); writeFile("/sdcard/Tasker/v3_debug.log", ts + " | " + msg + " ", true); }
